goals._comment: GM-FACING ONLY — never shown to the player as a HUD/quest log. The GM keeps these current and makes sure each scene's hooks and options point at the active short-term goal, surfaced through fiction (an NPC asks, a deadline looms), not menus. Gives the player direction without breaking immersion.

drift._comment: Only present if the 'drift' module is active. Hidden world-reroute engine; see references/drift.md.

_modules.comment: Module-specific state blocks go here or at top level, per the game. E.g. the magic-potency module uses a 'spirit_tongue' block; a stats module might use 'stats'. The seed (the game's own state.seed.json) sets initial values.
